[Mon 2026-04-13 08:37 UTC] [Subagent Context] You are running as a subagent (depth 1/2). Results auto-announce to your requester; do not busy-poll for status.

[Subagent Task]: You are working in workspace: /root/.openclaw/workspaces/teacher-driving-training-system.bootstrap-backup/ahv-qlhv-fe

## Mission
Redesign the tuition page to look like a professional finance/banking app.

## Step 1: Find current files
Run: `ls src/app/tuition/`

## Step 2: Read the current tuition page code

## Step 3: Check fee service
Run: `find src/services -name "*fee*" -o -name "*tuition*" 2>/dev/null | head -10`

## Step 4: Read shadcn table/card components
Run: `ls src/components/ui/ | grep -E "table|card|data-table|badge|button|input|select|tabs|chart"`

## Step 5: Implement redesign
Create a professional finance-style tuition page at `src/app/tuition/page.tsx`:

```tsx
// Professional Finance Dashboard Layout
// - Dark blue header with summary stats
// - 4 KPI cards: Tổng thu, Đã thu, Chưa thu, Quá hạn
// - Search + date range filter bar
// - Data table with: STT, Học viên, Khóa học, Số tiền, Trạng thái, Hạn nộp
// - Status badges: Xanh (đã đóng), Vàng (chờ), Đỏ (quá hạn)
// - Pagination
// - Export CSV button
```

Requirements:
- Use existing shadcn/ui components (Table, Badge, Card, Button, Input, Select)
- Tailwind classes: bg-slate-900 text-white for header, bg-white cards
- Real data from fee service (or mock if not available)
- `yarn lint` and `yarn build` must pass

## Step 6: Git workflow
```
git fetch origin && git checkout -b feat/tuition-page-finance-style origin/develop
git add src/app/tuition/page.tsx
git commit -m "feat(tuition): redesign with professional finance dashboard style"
git push origin feat/tuition-page-finance-style
```

## Step 7: Create MR via GitLab API
```
POST https://gitlab.com/api/v4/projects/81078350/merge_requests
title: "feat(tuition): redesign with professional finance dashboard style"
source_branch: feat/tuition-page-finance-style
target_branch: develop
```

## Step 8: Post the MR URL to the group chat
